## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BellRing;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BellRing { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
alarm, notification, sound, reminder

## Categories
notifications

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/bell-ring)
